{{Person | Name=Björn Pankratz | Guid=3040-193136 | Deck=Björn Pankratz was the Creative Director for Piranha Bytes from 1999 until 2024. In 2024, he and his wife Jennifer Pankratz founded the Indie Game Studio Pithead Studio. | Gender=Male | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Cralon,Games/ELEX,Games/ELEX_II,Games/Gothic,Games/Gothic_3,Games/Gothic_Classic_Khorinis_Saga,Games/Gothic_II,Games/Gothic_II_Night_of_the_Raven,Games/Risen,Games/Risen_2_Dark_Waters,Games/Risen_3_Titan_Lords | Locations= | Objects= | People=People/Jennifer_Pankratz | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/161/1613774/3743464-7558203187-62255.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3743464-7558203187-62255.jpg","path":"161\/1613774\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,scale_small,scale_medium,square_medium,square_mini,square_small,square_tiny,square_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Björn Pankratz was the Creative Director for [https://www.mobygames.com/company/2010/piranha-bytes-gmbh Piranha Bytes] from 1999 until 2024. In 2024, he and his wife [https://www.mobygames.com/person/539722/jennifer-pankratz Jennifer Pankratz] founded the Indie Game Studio Pithead Studio.
